summary: The unit test suite provides strong coverage of the core `generateMatrix` function with comprehensive testing of all major features (exclude, include, max-parallel, fail-fast, max-size validation) and edge cases (empty dimensions, multiple rules). However, it has notable gaps: (1) no tests for the CLI entry point (`src/main.ts`), which handles file I/O, JSON parsing, and error reporting; (2) missing type validation tests (non-string/number/boolean values); (3) limited boundary condition testing (e.g., exactly at size limit); (4) some include/exclude edge cases untested (partial dimension matching, includes with only custom fields). The design is clear with logical grouping and readable test names, though workflow structure tests are somewhat mixed with business logic tests. The test suite would reliably catch regressions in matrix generation logic but has blind spots around CLI robustness and type safety.
